learners.reason: Adding invoice worsens mismatch — EduClear already above Kid-e-Sys

safeDryRun.error: Sibling validation failed for account MOO003

afterSafeCatchUpOnly.note: Excluded: 44 matching accounts (48 learners), NDA001 partial, TSH016 over-balance

integrityGateNote: Dry-run produced 54 invoice lines but integrity gate returned 422 because 46 billing groups include excluded manual-review siblings who remain eligible but outside run scope (e.g. MOO003, DIN002). Safe accounts themselves do not introduce new Kid-e-Sys mismatches.
approvalRecommendation: DO NOT APPLY — manual review required first
criticalNotes: 48 of 104 catch-up learners sit on 44 accounts that currently MATCH Kid-e-Sys (R154,450 invoice value). These are predominantly partial sibling families where one sibling received June invoice and another was missed. Applying catch-up will post the missed sibling invoices and will change those account balances.
TSH016 is in the catch-up set but EduClear balance already exceeds Kid-e-Sys by R6,350. June catch-up would widen the gap — manual review required.
MAT012 appears in Kid-e-Sys PDF but is MISSING from EduClear accounts (0 balance both sides in comparison). Catch-up does not address this.
message: READ-ONLY analysis. Safe list dry-run complete. Await explicit user approval before any write.
